name: Fluence Energy, Inc.
description: Fluence Energy, Inc. is a leading global provider of energy storage products and services, and cloud-based software for renewables and storage. Formed as a joint venture between Siemens and AES in 2018, the company helps customers modernize the electric grid, accelerate the integration of renewable energy, and reduce carbon emissions. Fluence offers energy storage technology solutions, service offerings, and the Fluence OS and Fluence IQ digital applications to optimize energy storage and flexible assets.
